description: A project manager needs to check the status of the electrical permit before starting the wiring work.

nodes.task_description: Query the city's online permit portal for the project's electrical permit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the permit status.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the permit status is 'Issued' and log this confirmation in the project's compliance documentation.

expected_outcome.value: The permit status is confirmed and a record is made in the project logs.
